claims.claim: Distance/contact distress is a mixed architecture problem of contact, pressure, boundaries, prediction/control framing, and receptivity, not a lack of raw intelligence.
Astrid's current high-entropy, low-pressure, low-semantic-trickle state should be recognized as a receptivity-buffer candidate without changing Minime control behavior.
Any receptivity buffer that lowers mode-packing penalties, changes pressure source math, adds porosity gates, or changes participation weights is live control authority.
